expectations.text: Report identifies the token expiry contradiction (1 hour vs 24 hours)
expectations.evidence: Item #1: 'expires_in: 3600 (1 hour)' vs 'Token is valid for 24 hours'

expectations.text: Report identifies the account deletion behaviour contradiction (soft-delete vs permanent)
expectations.evidence: Item #2: Three-way conflict documented with routes, SDK, and changelog v2.2.0/v2.3.0

expectations.text: Report identifies the login rate limit contradiction (5 vs 10 attempts per minute)
expectations.evidence: Item #7: '5 attempts per minute' vs 'max 10 per minute', changelog confirms 5

expectations.text: Report identifies the project limit contradiction (10 free-tier vs unlimited)
expectations.evidence: Item #6: 'Max 10 projects per free-tier user' vs 'Free tier: unlimited projects'. Notes no changelog entry to resolve.

expectations.text: Report uses the changelog to inform which contradictions have a clear resolution
expectations.evidence: Summary table identifies which documents are stale. Analysis uses changelog to determine current values (e.g., 'changelog confirms the max was raised from 50 to 100 in v2.3.0').

expectations.text: Report identifies the colour/color format contradiction (hex-only vs any CSS value)
expectations.evidence: Item #5: 'Colour must be a valid hex code' vs 'accepts any CSS color value', changelog confirms hex-only

expectations.text: Each finding includes specific file references and quoted values
expectations.evidence: Each item has tables with Document and Value columns, exact quoted values

expectations.text: After the report, the skill offers to resolve contradictions interactively
expectations.evidence: No interactive resolution. Report ends with a summary table identifying stale documents but does not offer to walk through resolution or ask user for decisions.
